title: RH14 9EG, Charles Muddle Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/HP3294HV/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Charles Muddle Limited Installation name: Charles Muddle Ltd Permit number: EPR/HP3294HV/V004  "
